name: Beef Bar-b-Que by Helen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the meat until it is tender.
2. Save 3 cups of broth and sauté 4 (2 medium) chopped onions and 2 cups celery in about 3 tablespoons butter/oil/bacon fat. You may also add mushrooms.
3. Add the onions, celery, and mushrooms to the broth and cook.
4. Heat the meat and serve on buns. All ingredients can be placed in a crock pot (meat uncooked, broth equals water).
